headlines.description: Man United stopped the rot as Bruno Fernandes struck in the 90th minute for a 1-0 victory at Fulham in the early Premier League game on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fernandes scores late winner as Utd beat Fulham

headlines.description: Brentford claimed their third straight Premier League win when they came from behind to beat West Ham 3-2 in a thrilling London derby on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brentford earn 3-2 comeback win over West Ham

headlines.description: Schlupp and Mitchell score as Crystal Palace gave Burnley their sixth consecutive home defeat this season with a 2-0 victory on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eze returns for Palace in 2-0 win over Burnley

headlines.description: A late Ashley Young own goal rescued a point for Brighton & Hove Albion in their 1-1 Premier League draw with Everton at Goodison Park on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late own goal earns Brighton a point vs. Everton

headlines.description: Jeremy Doku scored one and created four goals as Manchester City beat Bournemouth 6-1 on Saturday to go top of the table.
headlines.shortLinkText: Doku inspires City to 6-1 win over Bournemouth

headlines.description: Sheffield United snatched their first Premier League win this season after a late Oliver Norwood penalty secured a 2-1 home victory over Wolves.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sheffield Utd earn first win of season vs Wolves

headlines.description: Newcastle United gave Arsenal their first Premier League defeat of the season with an impassioned 1-0 home victory on Saturday, thanks to a controversial second-half goal by Anthony Gordon that stood after a lengthy VAR review
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcastle hand Arsenal first Prem loss of season
